result.finding: No XML configuration files detected. Application uses Spring Boot with annotation-based @Configuration approach and application.properties files exclusively — no Spring XML context files, Hibernate .hbm.xml, web.xml, persistence.xml, or logging XML configs.
evidence: No *.xml files found under src/ directory (excluding pom.xml which is build-only)
No hibernate.cfg.xml or *.hbm.xml entity mapping files found
No web.xml (Spring Boot uses embedded Tomcat, no deployment descriptor needed)
No persistence.xml (Spring Data JPA configured via application.properties)
No log4j.xml or logback.xml (Spring Boot default Logback configured via properties)
Configuration uses Spring Boot auto-configuration, @SpringBootApplication, @Repository, @Service, @Controller annotations
values: Config approach: Spring Boot annotation-based auto-configuration
